textByHash.19f244859a0b4782db518d0a18be44800a4c1de8: I'm afraid you can't take part in Last Man Standing on this world.
textByHash.1ba9981e284f58390cb1034302b57bd69e92f640: A casual game will start in the next seconds!
textByHash.4ccfe2829e268853a8bcce64221450db663b39ee: Welcome, are you looking to take part in a game of Last Man Standing?
textByHash.57a5d6f70a02030ba57df332bbbaa0bc92eb60f0: After a game has started, lethal fog will soon start filling the arena. This forces contenders to a designated safe zone and ensures no one escapes the fighting.
textByHash.672412ef09aa9b6f6c8db0994463632fa05b681e: Come on, we need more competitive participants!
textByHash.84d10ae090c784a3ab89c387ddf55dc237928b35: Indeed. We have set up two arenas on another plane. When a game starts, we pick one at random. Once everyone arrives in the arena, the fight for survival begins.
textByHash.85fdf368833d179af4772d0e03fafb0245d8b99f: No problem, come back if you happen to change your mind.
textByHash.8d7acada35c465528a1a48ae0a49f4bc69a13597: Now, there's a few important things to be aware of. While in an arena, your physical and mental abilities will be boosted. Also, praying to the gods will not cost you any precious energies.
textByHash.a2e7fb18d9bf79227770cde0b8451f566df1a560: Come on, we need another competitive participant!
textByHash.aff0c55e66f76a458890f3d2bd5d07d47010e504: Which mode would you like to play?
textByHash.b81aaccff3370e538a71b95fabf1cbb83b6e1740: Now that you know more, would you like to take part in a game of Last Man Standing?
textByHash.c4cc34ba60b83f931714982b883b87d050f95636: Regarding what you are given on arrival, you have a few options to pick from. Use my supply chest to configure your load-outs for the different battle styles.
textByHash.d156ba8fbc9e5917f70ceaf6c8a0ba64b7b02edc: Be aware, you can't take any of your own belongings into the game. Instead, you can use only what you find in the arena, including anything we give you on arrival.
textByHash.ed74cdc0bcb57cd663728253824e183193b2a6a3: Remember, this is a solo competition! Anyone attempting to form teams for an unfair advantage will be banished from further participation.
textByHash.f40d0f0e05c6bfe21d269f656d8aab67e0c001c7: Come on, we need more High Stakes participants!
textByHash.fb507074b6319cdaf4a25c49ac7144807c363e83: Come on, we need another High Stakes participant!
textByHash.fb50e890ac342de74db1354d3313c415a9ea3f87: It's simple. Anyone looking to participate enters the relevant waiting area. Once the waiting area has enough people, they are taken to the arena.
